Naked Gun & Airplane! are cream of the crop for the genre and it looks like this honors that.  I hope the Zucker/Abrams mafia embraces this and doesn’t fight it.  Fart jokes and slapstick needs a new audience.

As someone who has seen all 3 Naked Gun movies (mainly fragments though), I think this film aligns with the franchise's humor. The O.J joke was inevitable, but it landed...for me at least. There is some slight continuity since Frank Jr was born in '94 which would make him in his early thirties. I'm sure the film will find some joke to work around that though. From what I've seen though, and I confess to skipping out on some parts, the trailer does seem decent enough. Is it likely to be more violent? Yes. Is it likely to have dirtier jokes? For sure.
